arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'REJECT proposal to sign Virgil van Dijk when his Liverpool contract expires' after defender's agents 'approached Spanish giants over a possible deal'
arts.sum: Real Madrid rejected an advance from representatives of Virgil van Dijk over a summer move, reports in Spain have claimed.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Deportiva Minera vs Real Madrid, 2025 Copa del Rey
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Deportiva Minera in the Copa del Rey. HOW TO WATCH, STREAM COPA DEL REY

arts.ttl: Real Madrid turn down chance to sign Liverpool star on free transfer
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid recently made the call to knock back the chance to bring in Liverpool star Virgil van Dijk this coming summer. That’s according to Relevo, who…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid make big decision on River Plate starlet Franco Mastantuono
arts.sum: Spanish and European champions Real Madrid have also shown an interest in Mastontuono, who made his first-team debut for River as a 16-year-old in January 2024. River Plate starlet Franco Mastantuono is attracting interest from a host of major European suitors, but AS understands that the teenager is not expected to leave the Argentinian club during the January transfer window .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid make contact over deal for in-demand Lens star
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Real Madrid have made first contacts over a potential deal for a member of the defensive ranks at RC Lens. That’s according to French…

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold 'shook for hours', furious reaction spotted and Real Madrid update
arts.sum: The spotlight is only getting more intense on Trent Alexander-Arnold with his Liverpool contract expiring, an offer coming in from Real Madrid and a poor performance against Manchester United

arts.ttl: Real Madrid set their sights on Real Sociedad midfielder Martín Zubimendi
arts.sum: Since Real Madrid legend Toni Kroos hung up his boots at the end of last season, there has been a real void in midfield in Carlo Ancelotti’s team. Los Blancos…

arts.ttl: 'Real Madrid? More like Tranmere' - has future talk 'affected' Trent?
arts.sum: A disappointing display in Liverpool's 2-2 draw with Manchester United has prompted questions about whether Trent Alexander-Arnold has been affected by talk about his future, with his contract ending this summer and Real Madrid interested?

arts.ttl: Manuel Prast and the only time Real Madrid dominated the Copa del Rey
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s only period of true dominance in the Copa del Rey dates back to an era when both the club and the competition were known by different names. Real Madrid have threepeated the European cup twice, but they managed the same only once in the Copa del Rey

arts.ttl: Real Madrid join race for Abdukodir Khusanov as Manchester City meet player’s entourage
arts.sum: The race to sign RC Lens’ Abdukodir Khusanov (20) is hotting up. The Uzbekistan international is garnering interest from Europe’s elite with Lens giving the green light for a transfer…
